LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NORTHERN CALIFORNIA VOLLEYBALL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. UNDER CALIFORNIA DENTAL ASSOCIATION V AMERICAN DENTAL ASSOCIATION (1979) 23C, 3RD 346, THE COURT INITIALLY DETERMINES WHETHER JUDICIAL ACTION IS APPROPRIATE BECAUSE THE CHALLENGED ACTION "PLAINLY CONTRAVENES" THE ASSOCIATION'S BY-LAWS. DEFENDANT'S INTERPRETATION OF ITS BY-LAWS WAS REASONABLE AND SO THE COURT NEED NOT BALANCE THE INTERESTS OF THE PARTIES. FURTHER, THE DECISION IN OAKLAND RAIDER V NFL (2005) 131 CAL. APP 4TH 621 PROVIDES SUPPORT FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT COURTS OUGHT NOT TO ENGAGE IS SUCH INTRA-ASSOCIATION DISPUTES. THE REQUEST TO CONTINUE IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO MAKE THE REQUIRED SHOWING UNDER CCP 437C. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
ORDER GRANTING MOTION OF DEFENDANT (NORTHERN CALIFORNIA VOLLEYBALL ASSOCIATION) FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. UNDER CALIFORNIA DENTAL ASSOCIATION V AMERICAN DENTAL ASSOCIATION (1979) 23C, 3RD 346, THE COURT INITIALLY DETERMINES WHETHER JUDICIAL ACTION IS APPROPRIATE BECAUSE THE CHALLENGED ACTION "PLAINLY CONTRAVENES" THE ASSOCIATION'S BY-LAWS. DEFENDANT'S INTERPRETATION OF ITS BY-LAWS WAS REASONABLE AND SO THE COURT NEED NOT BALANCE THE INTERESTS OF THE PARTIES. FURTHER, THE DECISION IN OAKLAND RAIDER V NFL (2005) 131 CAL. APP 4TH 621 PROVIDES SUPPORT FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT COURTS OUGHT NOT TO ENGAGE IS SUCH INTRA-ASSOCIATION DISPUTES. THE REQUEST TO CONTINUE IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO MAKE THE REQUIRED SHOWING UNDER CCP 437C. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
